mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tool_execution_log (session_id, message_id, tool_name, arguments, result, status, duration_ms, error_message, retry_count, created_at) VALUES (CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{messageId} AS uuid), #{toolName}, CAST(#{arguments} AS jsonb), #{result}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{createdAt})
